generated_oml:
namespace base = "http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://www.example.org/dtdf/vocab"

instance RobotAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with working range [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed of 75°/s for machining applications"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot with working range [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed of 75°/s, producing input current I_M and output torque τ_M"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission component in the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot, output torque τ_G"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot, output torque τ_out"
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted on the permanent magnet synchronous motor for measuring angular position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder located behind the gearbox for measuring angular position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current I_M of the motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance InputCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance SecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current I_M measured by current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque data derived from motor current and position measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted, MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from motor position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for the robot axis components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for the robot axis components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for the permanent magnet synchronous motor with Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, and LuGre friction models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for the gearwheel component"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for the cycloidal gearbox with friction models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AASMetadata : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for metadata and traceability of the robot axis components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for structural modeling of the robot axis components"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for simulation models with friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for metadata and traceability"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming of sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SINUMERIKControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for robot operation"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for real-time monitoring and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction using white-box (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck) and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through model refinement"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAlgorithmUpdateAction
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated dashboard visualization for real-time monitoring and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionBehaviorInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model parameters derived from simulation vs measured data deviations"
]

instance ControlAlgorithmUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Updating control algorithms to enhance motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance JointFrictionBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into joint friction behavior for maintenance and operational adjustments"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with sensor data streamed via MQTT, enabling continuous model updates and friction identification during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of SysML structural models, Simulink simulation models, live sensor data via MQTT, and AAS metadata into a unified digital shadow framework, with Processing components for model execution and a dashboard for visualization, all focused on the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), focusing on real-time data from the robot during active machining tasks to monitor and improve motion accuracy."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data (from Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, etc. models) against reference values from sensor measurements, with error analysis to refine model parameters for improved accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission from robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards for data traceability and metadata, SysML for system modeling, and MQTT for communication."
]
